query:
SELECT r.id, r.status, r.booking_date, r.product_id, r.product_name, r.people, r.customer_name,
  ro.id as op_id, ro.op_status, ro.client_confirmed, ro.monitor_id
FROM reservations r
LEFT JOIN reservation_operational ro ON ro.reservation_id = r.id
WHERE r.customer_name LIKE '%Simo%' OR r.customer_name LIKE '%Blanquez%'
LIMIT 5;
command:
